recommendations.title: Cosy Dens
recommendations.overview: Two families, Sebkovi and Krausovi, are celebrating Christmas, but not everyone is in a good mood. The teenage kids think that their fathers are totally stupid, and the fathers are sure that their children are nothing more than rebels, hating anythin

recommendations.title: The Most Beautiful Day
recommendations.overview: The overambitious pianist Andi and the more laid back Benno have one thing in common: They will both die soon. So the two of them decide to have the most awesome day before its too late.

recommendations.title: Cado dalle nubi
recommendations.overview: An aspiring singer from southern Italy who's just been dumped moves north to Milan, where he falls in love and enters a TV singing competition show.

recommendations.title: Butterflies
recommendations.overview: Three strangers with one thing in common — the same father — come to a Turkish village to bury him, and learn about him and each other.

recommendations.title: Al posto tuo
recommendations.overview: Two very different men have something in common: the work. When their companies are bought by a bigger one, who will take the only place of boss of the new company?

recommendations.title: Life As We Know It
recommendations.overview: After a disastrous first date for caterer Holly and network sports director Messer, all they have in common is a dislike for each other and their love for their goddaughter Sophie. But when they suddenly become all Sophie has in this world, Holly and

recommendations.title: My Straight Son
recommendations.overview: The story of Diego, a young and successful photographer that lives in the glamorous world of fashion, shallowness and excess. A tragic accident turns his world around; his partner is now in a coma. Unexpectedly, and right at this terrible time, Diego

recommendations.title: Fun Mom Dinner
recommendations.overview: Four women, whose kids attend the same preschool class, get together for a "fun mom dinner". When the night takes an unexpected turn, these unlikely new friends realize they have more in common than just marriage and motherhood.

recommendations.title: A Short Film About Love
recommendations.overview: 19-year-old Tomek whiles away his lonely life by spying on his opposite neighbour Magda through binoculars. She's an artist in her mid-thirties, and appears to have everything - not least a constant stream of men at her beck and call. But when the tw

recommendations.title: Thanks for Sharing
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy that brings together three disparate characters who are learning to face a challenging and often confusing world as they struggle together against a common demon—sex addiction.
